pi_items.source: Verified against the explicit task description instructions and standard Talon user script directory on Windows (%APPDATA%\talon\user).

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating synthetic Talon module files from scratch. The expected output directory is verified to be C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\intel_mapper, directly matching the prompt instructions and default Talon behavior. However, a major issue was identified: the setup_task.ps1 and export_result.ps1 hook scripts referenced in task.json are completely missing from the task repository, meaning the verifier dependencies (task_result.json and intel_mapper.zip) can never be generated.
